name: Moon League Sports Season
description: Under the light of the full moon, three monster-girlfriends are preparing for the brightest sports competitions of the year - the Lunar League Championship. Help the girls choose stylish sports outfits, trendy hairstyles and bright makeup for each competition. Create unique sports looks: from elegant dresses for the opening ceremony to uniforms for training. Mix colors, accessories and shoes to make each monstro-athlete shine in her own way. The Lunar League is waiting for its champions!
instructions: Depending on the gaming device either a click of a computer mouse or a simple touch on touchscreens is used to control it
